changelog: v2.1.7 - GERCEK COZUM: Classic tema MioAjax pattern uygulandi
sign-in.php: $master_content_none + MioAjax submit + signin_submit JS + two-factor + location-verification modal
sign-up.php: $master_content_none + mio-ajax-form + signup_submit JS + kurumsal/bireysel radio cards
Submit butonu: type=button + mio-ajax-submit class + mio-ajax-options JSON
WiseCP login endpoint AJAX bekliyor - normal POST CSRF hatasi veriyordu
Auth sayfa tasarimi: 2-kolon (promo + form), Codega gradient + glassmorphism
